def solve(prices : Array(Int64), strategy : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
    n = prices.length
    original_profit = 0
    for i in 0...n
        original_profit += strategy[i] * prices[i]
    end

    # compute prefix_neg and prefix_one
    prefix_neg = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    prefix_one = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }

    for i in 0...n
        prefix_neg[i+1] = prefix_neg[i] + (-strategy[i] * prices[i])
        prefix_one[i+1] = prefix_one[i] + ( (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] )
    end

    max_delta = 0

    # for each possible window starting at i
    for i in 0...n - k + 1
        # the window is from i to i + k -1
        # first half is k/2 elements
        half = k / 2
        # first part: i to i + half -1
        # sum_neg is prefix_neg[i + half] - prefix_neg[i]
        sum_neg = prefix_neg[i + half] - prefix_neg[i]
        # second part: i + half to i + k -1
        # sum_one is prefix_one[i + k] - prefix_one[i + half]
        sum_one = prefix_one[i + k] - prefix_one[i + half]
        delta = sum_neg + sum_one
        if delta > max_delta
            max_delta = delta
        end
    end

    return original_profit + max(0, max_delta)
end
